Dialog.name: MSG_706_100
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 10}So this is one of those huge Shadows, huh. Well, not like it changes what we usually do...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_000
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}This large Shadow's Arcana is the Hermit. Watch out for attacks that use electricity![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_200
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 6}The enemy Shadow is charging a lot of electricity inside its body![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_210
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 6}It might be up to something. I'll analyze it on my end as well![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_300
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 0 6}I've got it. The enemy gets stronger by absorbing electrical power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_310
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 0 6}But, it seems the enemy's defense drops temporarily while it's charging up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_320
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 0 6}To stop the enemy from powering up, you'll need to attack while it's charging![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}The enemy Shadow is charging up now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_002
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}We've stopped the enemy from powering up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_400
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 0 6}The enemy is stronger than before! Everyone, be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_500
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 9 0 6}This is different from how it's been charging up till now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_510
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 10 0 6}Is it sucking electricity from the entire city...!? If it absorbs all that power, we'll be in trouble![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_520
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 11 0 6}If we attack it now, we can stop it from powering up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_600
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 12 0 6}I sense an enormous amount of energy from the enemy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_706_610
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 13 0 6}It's powered up significantly. Everyone, hang in there![n]{f 1 1}
